hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE '(OPENAI_API_KEY=|codex[[:space:]]+login[[:space:]]+--api-key[[:space:]]+[^[:space:]])' && jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Blocked by .claude/rules/escalation.md (Codex auth mode). Codex must use ChatGPT-subscription auth only; assigning OPENAI_API_KEY or running codex login with an --api-key value would flip to per-token API billing."}}' || true
out=$(dotnet build --nologo -v q 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s' "$out" | jq -Rs '{systemMessage: ("dotnet build FAILED at session end — fix before next session:\n\n" + .)}'; fi
